form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 16 at Chantilly All Weather December 9 over 1600m, 2 len behind Fecamp with 59kg at $4.20. First up last campaign second of 14 at Chantilly All Weather November 18 over 1600m, 0.5 len behind Intuition with 58kg at $16. In the right race and sure to go well.
